name: Argosy Research Inc.
summary: Argosy Research Inc. produces and sells electronic connectors and system products. The company's products include electronic connectors, such as USB3.1 type-C, DDR3/4/5, M.2(NGFF), mini PCIe, LVDS, RF coaxial, battery, FAKRA, etc.; antenna and nut metal stamping parts; and injection/molding parts. Argosy Research Inc. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.
